response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed geospatial pipelines — critical for this role. His DLang and Node.js work shows system-level competence, but the resume lacks evidence of routing tile optimization, real-time traffic integration, or low-latency map data processing at scale.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world NGO usage
Demonstrated systems-level coding in DLang and low-latency server development
Proven ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks and domains
concerns: No explicit C++ or Rust experience in commercial routing or geospatial pipelines
Career gap since October 2025 raises questions about current technical engagement
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js, not the required C++/systems domain
